creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Fri May  3 20:26:49 2013
New Revision: 317236
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317236

Log:
  DRI stands for Domain Registration Interface and aims to be,
  for domain name registries/registrars/resellers
  what Perl DBI is for databases.
  
  Net::DRI offers a uniform API to access services.
  It can be used by registrars to access registries.
  It can be used by clients to access registrars and/or resellers.
  It can be used by anonyone to do whois, DAS or IRIS DCHK queries.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-DRI/
  
  PR:		ports/178298
  Submitted by:	Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>

Added:
  head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/
  head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/Makefile.man   (contents, props changed)
  head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/dns/Makefile

Modified: head/dns/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/Makefile	Fri May  3 19:50:55 2013	(r317235)
+++ head/dns/Makefile	Fri May  3 20:26:49 2013	(r317236)
@@ -106,6 +106,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-DNS-ZoneFile-Fast
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-DNSBL-MultiDaemon
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-DNSBL-Statistics
+    SUBDIR += p5-Net-DRI
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-Domain-ExpireDate
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-Domain-TLD
     SUBDIR += p5-Net-LibIDN

Added: head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/Makefile	Fri May  3 20:26:49 2013	(r317236)
@@ -0,0 +1,36 @@
+# Created by: Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	Net-DRI
+PORTVERSION=	0.96
+CATEGORIES=	dns perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	feld@feld.me
+COMMENT=	A Perl library to access Domain Name Registries/Registrars
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-DateTime>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTime \
+		p5-DateTime-Format-ISO8601>0.06:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTime-Format-ISO8601 \
+		p5-DateTime-Format-Strptime>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTime-Format-Strptime \
+		p5-DateTime-TimeZone>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-DateTime-TimeZone \
+		p5-Class-Accessor>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor \
+		p5-Class-Accessor-Chained>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor-Chained \
+		p5-Time-HiRes>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Time-HiRes \
+		p5-Email-Valid>0:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Valid \
+		p5-IO-Socket-SSL>0.90:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-IO-Socket-SSL \
+		p5-XML-LibXML>1.61:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML \
+		p5-UNIVERSAL-require>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-UNIVERSAL-require \
+		p5-SOAP-Lite>0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-SOAP-Lite \
+		p5-SOAP-WSDL>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-SOAP-WSDL \
+		p5-libwww>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
+		p5-Digest-MD5>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/p5-Digest-MD5 \
+		p5-Net-DNS>0:${PORTSDIR}/dns/p5-Net-DNS \
+		p5-MIME-Tools>0:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-MIME-Tools
+
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
+
+.include "${.CURDIR}/Makefile.man"
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

+SIZE (Net-DRI-0.96.tar.gz) = 446270

Added: head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/dns/p5-Net-DRI/pkg-descr	Fri May  3 20:26:49 2013	(r317236)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+DRI stands for Domain Registration Interface and aims to be,
+for domain name registries/registrars/resellers
+what Perl DBI is for databases.
+
+Net::DRI offers a uniform API to access services.
+It can be used by registrars to access registries.
+It can be used by clients to access registrars and/or resellers.
+It can be used by anonyone to do whois, DAS or IRIS DCHK queries.
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-DRI/
